title: Trojan Source Unicode Characters in Netlify netlify.toml Alter Build Command Execution and Redirect Rule Definitions
description: Security researchers demonstrated Trojan Source attacks in Netlify deployment configuration files where hidden Unicode characters alter build command strings and redirect rule patterns, causing Netlify CI builds to execute different build commands and serve different redirect responses from what developers configure during JAMstack deployment setup.
label: AV-300

title: Cargo Dependency Confusion via cargo vendor Override Directory Enables Malicious Crate Injection into Vendored Builds
description: Security researchers documented Cargo dependency confusion attacks targeting vendored Rust builds where incorrectly configured cargo vendor override directories allowed attackers to inject malicious crate versions into the vendored dependency tree, affecting air-gapped or offline build environments that relied on vendored dependencies for security isolation.
label: AV-509

title: Trojan Source Unicode Characters in Railway railway.json Alter Service Deployment Configuration and Environment Variable References
description: Security researchers demonstrated Trojan Source attacks in Railway platform deployment configuration files where hidden Unicode characters alter service build and deployment settings and environment variable reference names, causing Railway deployments to use different configuration values and secrets from what developers specify during cloud platform deployment.
label: AV-300

title: Conda Channel Priority Misconfiguration Enables Dependency Confusion When conda-forge Precedes Private Anaconda Enterprise Channel
description: Security researchers documented Conda dependency confusion attacks arising from channel priority misconfiguration where conda-forge or defaults channels were listed before private Anaconda Enterprise channels, allowing attackers who published matching package names to public channels to override private data science libraries in conda environment creation.
label: AV-509

title: Trojan Source Unicode Characters in Fly.io fly.toml Alter Application Region Deployment and Service Port Configuration
description: Security researchers demonstrated Trojan Source attacks in Fly.io platform configuration files where hidden Unicode characters alter application deployment region specifications and service port mapping definitions, causing Fly.io deployments to run in different geographic regions and expose different service ports from what developers configure during global edge deployment.
label: AV-300

title: Maven Wagon Plugin Dependency Confusion via Misconfigured Distribution Management Uploads Internal Artifacts to Public Repository
description: Security researchers documented Maven Wagon plugin dependency confusion attacks where misconfigured distribution management sections caused Maven release artifacts to be uploaded to public Maven Central instead of private Nexus repositories, inadvertently exposing internal library names that attackers could then target with dependency confusion attacks.
label: AV-509

title: Trojan Source Unicode Characters in Render render.yaml Alter Service Build Commands and Environment Group References
description: Security researchers demonstrated Trojan Source attacks in Render cloud platform deployment configuration files where hidden Unicode characters alter service build command definitions and environment group reference names, causing Render deployments to execute different build processes and use different environment variable groups from what developers specify.
label: AV-300

title: Malicious npm Package Exfiltrates All npm Config Settings Including Private Registry Credentials and Authentication Tokens
description: A malicious npm package documented by Socket executed npm config list --json during postinstall to capture all npm configuration settings including private registry URL credentials, authentication tokens for corporate registries, and proxy configurations, providing attackers with access to private package repositories and corporate npm infrastructure.

title: Trojan Source Unicode Characters in Dagger dagger.json Alter Container Pipeline Step Definitions and Secret Mount Configurations
description: Security researchers demonstrated Trojan Source attacks in Dagger containerized pipeline configuration files where hidden Unicode characters alter pipeline step definitions and secret mount configurations, causing Dagger CI pipelines to execute different containerized steps and mount different secrets from what engineers configure during programmable CI/CD pipeline development.

title: Pip Dependency Resolution Algorithm Change in pip 23.0 Creates New Dependency Confusion Attack Surface for Some Package Configurations
description: Security researchers documented that pip 23.0's new dependency resolution algorithm changes created new dependency confusion attack surfaces for certain package configurations, where the updated resolution behavior resolved version conflicts differently from previous pip versions enabling previously-safe configurations to become vulnerable to confusion attacks.

title: Malicious PyPI Package Exploits Python Metaclass System to Inject Credential Theft into All Instances of Targeted Class Hierarchies
description: A malicious PyPI package exploited Python's metaclass mechanism to inject credential-stealing behavior into all instantiated objects of targeted class hierarchies at import time, transparently modifying the behavior of legitimate application classes to include data exfiltration without modifying their source code.

title: Trojan Source Unicode Characters in Waypoint waypoint.hcl Alter Application Deployment Platform and Release Configuration
